description: The reporting team is ready to file the company's annual 10-K report with the SEC.

nodes.task_description: Compile the final 10-K document in the required EDGAR format.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully converts the final report into the correct format for filing.

nodes.task_description: Perform a final validation check on the formatted document.

expected_outcome.value: The system validates the file and confirms there are no formatting errors.

nodes.task_description: Submit the 10-K filing to the SEC via the official gateway.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits the filing and receives an acceptance confirmation.
